accountid.description: Cin7 Core account ID, sent as the api-auth-accountid header on every request.

api_key.description: Cin7 Core application key, sent as the api-auth-applicationkey header. Never logged.

base_url.description: Cin7 Core API base URL override for tests or proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
